dispositions.title: How Star Atlas Governance Took Shape
dispositions.reason: Overlaps the institutional article and gives governance mechanics too much weight for an entrance portfolio.

dispositions.title: Beyond the Vote
dispositions.reason: The material is valuable but better suited to case studies and advanced governance research.

dispositions.title: Following the Treasury
dispositions.reason: The current emphasis is evidence process; a future public article should center funded work and outcomes.

dispositions.title: ATLAS and POLIS
dispositions.reason: Retain the subject but lead with player and ecosystem use rather than archival measurement limits.

dispositions.title: From SCORE to Starbased
dispositions.reason: The player-facing transition and the broader SAGE taxonomy require separate narratives.

dispositions.title: The Showroom and Holosim
dispositions.reason: The products are distinct experiences with different histories and audiences.

dispositions.title: How Star Atlas Communicated Its Development
dispositions.reason: The chronology supports historical and media narratives but is too archive-process-centered as a foundational article.

dispositions.title: The Recorded Community
dispositions.reason: Retain the subject while centering the shared community tradition rather than speaker-attribution limits.

dispositions.title: The Institutions Behind Star Atlas
dispositions.reason: Substantially overlaps the governance history and should become one concise institutional guide.

dispositions.title: Welcome to the Galia Expanse
dispositions.reason: Retain as the lore gateway and allow important factions, peoples and history to support their own stories.

dispositions.title: The People of Star Atlas
dispositions.reason: Retain the human-centered gateway while developing stronger guild, media and event knowledge.
